title: Space invite codes are permanent and irrevocable
description: use_space_invite_code never deletes or invalidates the invite code after use. SpaceInvite/set destroy returns 'forbidden' unconditionally (jmap.rs:1723-1727) so there is no way to revoke an invite code once created. An invite link shared in a group chat, leaked via screenshot, or issued to a user who later leaves remains valid forever (expires_at defaults to NULL = never). A removed member can re-join at any time; there is no remediation path for a leaked invite. Minimum fix: allow SpaceInvite destroy (delete the row). Optionally: single-use invites deleted on first use.
